name: marknative
description: Native Markdown rendering engine — produces paginated PNG/SVG documents without a browser

scripts.build: bun build src/index.ts --outdir dist --target node --format esm --external '@chenglou/pretext' --external 'mdast-util-from-markdown' --external 'mdast-util-gfm' --external 'micromark' --external 'micromark-extension-gfm' --external 'skia-canvas' && bunx tsc -p tsconfig.build.json
scripts.prepublishOnly: bun run typecheck && bun run test && bun run build
scripts.docs:dev: bun run docs:examples && vitepress dev docs
scripts.docs:build: bun run docs:examples && vitepress build docs
